generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that increasing defense spending by just 2% could make our country the most secure it's been in decades? While some worry about civil liberties, smart investments in national security actually protect our freedoms. Our allies are counting on us to lead - let's step up and fulfill our duty. #StrongDefense #NationalSecurity
